info.name: Simple Chat App - Express Backend
info.description: Complete API and Socket.io event collection for the Simple Chat App backend

request.description: Get new access token using refresh token
Get a specific user by ID
Connect to Socket.io server with JWT authentication
Request list of all online users
Listen for when a user comes online
Listen for when a user goes offline
Send a message to another user
Listen for incoming messages from other users
Send confirmation that message was read
Listen for read receipts on sent messages
Send typing indicator to another user
Listen for typing indicators from other users
Handle various Socket.io errors and events
Complete workflow showing registration, login, connection, and message exchange

variable.description: JWT Access Token from login response
JWT Refresh Token from login response
